a:r.a:t: Sharing ALL SW audit report to business
a) Biz uploads existing POE onto EARL for each
b) If POE not available, biz uninstalls/ purchases
c) Biz confirms Audit team that remediation done
d) Audit team reviews the remediation
present, business to remediate till zero gaps.
f) If no gaps, Audit team sends closure request to GECC for the particular
Audit Team performs recon every 2 weeks for each target
If gaps present, business to remediate till zero gaps
Cap Intl HQ, Capital HQ & Business
GECC to perform final review before closure for each
This will constitute as baseline data for upload onto Earl
